error[E0277]: `Cell<i32>` cannot be shared between threads safely
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/claude-sonnet-4.5/expressions/struct_and_union_2/sample_001/target.rs:10:12
   |
10 | static VS: VolatileS = VolatileS {
   |            ^^^^^^^^^ `Cell<i32>` cannot be shared between threads safely
   |
   = help: within `VolatileS`, the trait `Sync` is not implemented for `Cell<i32>`
   = note: if you want to do aliasing and mutation between multiple threads, use `std::sync::RwLock` or `std::sync::atomic::AtomicI32` instead
note: required because it appears within the type `VolatileS`
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/claude-sonnet-4.5/expressions/struct_and_union_2/sample_001/target.rs:15:8
   |
15 | struct VolatileS {
   |        ^^^^^^^^^
   = note: shared static variables must have a type that implements `Sync`

error[E0277]: `Cell<S>` cannot be shared between threads safely
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/claude-sonnet-4.5/expressions/struct_and_union_2/sample_004/target.rs:10:12
   |
10 | static VS: Cell<S> = Cell::new(S { i: 5, ci: 6 });
   |            ^^^^^^^ `Cell<S>` cannot be shared between threads safely
   |
   = help: the trait `Sync` is not implemented for `Cell<S>`
   = note: if you want to do aliasing and mutation between multiple threads, use `std::sync::RwLock`
   = note: shared static variables must have a type that implements `Sync`

error[E0599]: the method `get` exists for struct `Cell<S>`, but its trait bounds were not satisfied

   | -------- doesn't satisfy `S: Copy`
...

   |                     ^^^
   |
   = note: the following trait bounds were not satisfied:
           `S: Copy`
help: consider annotating `S` with `#[derive(Clone, Copy)]`
